creator: alexis@minec.kreml.nnov.ru
text:
There is a server Fujitsu RX2450 M1 R4
Produced installation of the operating system FreeBSD 10.2. Disk Partitioning is done correctly. When extracted kernel.txz - an error occurs:
mfi0: Failed to get command. The installation is terminated.
mfi0: COMMAND 0xfff.... TIMEOUT AFTER ... SECONDS

LSI MegaRAID SAS-MFI PRAID ED400i installed in the server.
